kernel_loader.summary: Unified recursive kernel loader with symbolic organs, adaptive feedback, spiral memory, governance, modular runtime execution, and fully normalized semantic blocks.

primary.name: ingest_and_stabilize
primary.meaning: Accept raw input, normalize it, distribute it across specialized subsystems, recurse through feedback, stabilize state, fuse outputs, narrate results, and persist the outcome.
primary.role: Core execution objective of the kernel.
constraints: Final outputs must be auditable and replayable.

secondary_01.name: implementation_path
secondary_01.meaning: Provide a direct path from specification to runtime implementation.
secondary_01.role: Bridges conceptual design and executable code.

secondary_02.name: observability
secondary_02.meaning: Expose internal transitions at each stage of execution.

secondary_03.name: semantic_separation
secondary_03.meaning: Keep symbolic abstraction distinct from execution semantics.
secondary_03.role: Prevents metaphor from becoming hidden control flow.

principle_01.name: recursion
principle_01.meaning: The system may revisit prior state transforms under controlled conditions.
constraints: Recursive updates must not bypass governance.

principle_02.name: stability
principle_02.meaning: The system favors bounded state change and controlled convergence.
principle_02.role: Prevents drift, oscillation, and runaway branching.

principle_03.name: modularity
principle_03.meaning: Subsystems must be separable, replaceable, and independently observable.
principle_03.role: Enables clean composition of organs, engines, and overlays.
constraints: Replacement must not break canonical state.

principle_04.name: traceability
principle_04.meaning: Every meaningful transformation should have a provenance trail.

principle_05.name: governance
principle_05.meaning: Privileged operations must be policy-gated and verifiable.
principle_05.role: Protects the kernel from unsafe transitions.
constraints: Unsafe actions must be blocked or quarantined.
Rollback paths must exist for critical changes.

agent_states.role: Live per-agent reasoning and memory states.
agent_states.description: Holds the active configurations of all agents.

memory_organs.description: Includes hardpoints, caches, and coordinate-based anchors.

governance_signals.description: Carries approval, denial, and risk state.

narrative_outputs.description: Explains what the kernel believes it did and why.

metrics.description: Tracks stability, coherence, entropy, and recursion depth.

audit_traces.description: Records major transitions, decisions, and structural changes.

agent_model.description: The active set of reasoning agents participating in kernel execution.

forward_input.meaning: Incoming signal from the primary direction.

backward_input.meaning: Reflected or corrective signal from recursion.

forward_weight.meaning: Relative trust assigned to the forward input.

backward_weight.meaning: Relative trust assigned to the backward input.

recursive_output.meaning: Feedback-integrated output for agent a at time t.

confidence.meaning: Local confidence in the current output.

output_01.name: fused_output
output_01.meaning: The final combined result of agent fusion.

output_03.name: coherence
output_03.meaning: Consistency across narrative, structure, and policy.

output_05.name: narrative_summary
output_05.meaning: Human-readable summary of the system’s current state.

Stack.role: recursive call state and transient symbolic frames

push.meaning: Add a frame to the top of the stack.

pop.meaning: Remove the most recent frame from the stack.

peek.meaning: Inspect the top frame without removal.

is_empty.meaning: Report whether the stack contains no frames.

Heap.role: prioritized fragments requiring retention or re-evaluation

insert.meaning: Add an item to the priority store.

peek.meaning: Inspect the highest-priority item without removal.

Queue.role: ordered event streams and staged transformations

enqueue.meaning: Append an item to the tail of the queue.

dequeue.meaning: Remove the oldest item from the queue.

peek.meaning: Inspect the head item without removal.

is_empty.meaning: Report whether the queue contains no items.

Funnel.role: two-way integration channel for forward and backward signals

accept_backward.meaning: Receive the reflected or corrective signal.

merge.meaning: Combine both signals under policy constraints.

NeutralZone.role: stabilized outputs, resolved conflicts, consolidated summaries

absorb.meaning: Receive unstable or intermediate output for stabilization.

HardPoints.role: durable memories with coordinates and metadata

retrieve.meaning: Fetch an anchored memory by coordinate or tag.

delete.meaning: Remove an anchored record under governance.

recursive_feedback.formula: R[a,t] = (w_f[a,t] * X_f[a,t] + w_b[a,t] * X_b[a,t]) / (w_f[a,t] + w_b[a,t] + epsilon)
recursive_feedback.meaning: Weighted integration of forward and reflected signals.

spiral_memory.description: Deterministic spatial indexing for traceable memory placement.

arfs_energy.formula: E_t = K * A_t * R_t * F_t * S_t

variance_based.meaning: Prefer stable signals with lower variance.

entropy_based.meaning: Prefer information-rich signals with higher entropy.

hierarchical_embedding.description: Recursive nesting of state abstractions from raw event to high-level summary.

fusion_operator.description: Weighted combination of agent outputs into system-level state.
fusion_operator.formula: Fused = sum(alpha_a * S_a) over all agents a

narrative_operator.description: Generates interpretive explanation of system state.

stage_01.name: ingest
stage_01.purpose: Convert raw input into canonical event form.

stage_02.name: normalize
stage_02.purpose: Select relevant organs and standardize structures.

stage_03.name: distribute
stage_03.purpose: Send work to agents, recursion loops, or memory organs.

stage_05.name: stabilize
stage_05.purpose: Apply energy controls and governance checks.

stage_06.name: fuse
stage_06.purpose: Merge outputs into a unified system state.

stage_07.name: narrate
stage_07.purpose: Explain the current state in human-readable form.

stage_08.name: persist
stage_08.purpose: Store final and intermediate state for replay and audit.

ingest.purpose: Convert raw input into canonical event form.

normalize.purpose: Select relevant organs and standardize structures.

distribute.purpose: Send work to agents, recursion loops, or memory organs.

stabilize.purpose: Apply energy controls and governance checks.

fuse.purpose: Merge outputs into a unified system state.

narrate.purpose: Explain the current state in human-readable form.

persist.purpose: Store final and intermediate state for replay and audit.

energy.meaning: overall control signal for system stability

principle_01.name: policy_first
principle_01.meaning: Policy validation happens before privileged action.

principle_02.name: audit_every_mutation
principle_02.meaning: Every mutation of durable state is recorded.

principle_03.name: separate_symbol_from_authority
principle_03.meaning: Metaphor and execution authority remain distinct.

principle_05.name: narrative_must_not_override_measured_state
principle_05.meaning: Descriptive output cannot replace verified state.

rules.rule_01: Every new module must specify purpose, inputs, outputs, invariants, and failure modes.
rules.rule_02: Symbolic language may be extended, but runtime semantics must remain versioned.
rules.rule_03: Experimental modules belong in extension namespaces until stabilized.

fuse.formula: weighted sum of agent outputs with normalized weights

closing_frame.thesis: The kernel is strongest when it behaves like a disciplined recursive operating framework with a symbolic interface.
closing_frame.goal: Preserve identity, remove ambiguity, formalize data flow, and make the system testable and extensible.
